channel.title: HACKTHEON on Tzion
channel.description: Recent content in HACKTHEON on Tzion

item.title: [HACKTHEON] My Journey & Experience
item.description: Hackathon 2024 Adventure I am honored to participate in Hacktheon 2024 held in Sejong, South Korea with team Kopi Cincau consisting of Kelzin (@mechfrog88), Firdaus (@theddaus12), Ren (@Zeynarz) and me myself. Before diving into the details of this amazing journey, I would like to thank Cyberwise Inc and Secure D Global for their support and sponsorship to make this trip possible, I am truly grateful for this unforgettable experience. Arriving in Korea (June 18) We arrived at Seoul Incheon International Airport on the morning of June 18 and met FazeCT (@FazeCT1512) there.
